_comment: Copy this folder and rename it. Edit all values below.
_fpsLimitNote: Recommended: 50 for normal play, 0 to disable the cap.
_autoInitNote: Automatically start the first mission. Requires persistent=1 in server.cfg. Disables mission voting.
_hcNote: Number of Headless Client processes to start automatically. 0 = disabled.
_modsNote: Folder names of mods inside ServerInstallPath. These are passed as -mod= and must be present on all clients.
_serverModsNote: Server-only mods passed as -serverMod=. Clients do not need these. Cannot be used with Headless Clients.
_extraArgsNote: Additional raw command-line arguments passed to arma3server (e.g. ['-netlog', '-filePatching']).
_workshopNote: Used by Sync-Mods.ps1 to download mods from Steam Workshop. Id = Workshop URL ?id= value.
